description: This Java class 'StubSmsProvider' provides a stub implementation of an SMS provider, used for development or CI environments to simulate sending SMS messages without actually sending them. It logs message details instead.

classes.name: StubSmsProvider
classes.description: A stub implementation of the SmsProvider interface, used for testing and development environments to simulate SMS sending by logging message details.

methods.name: StubSmsProvider
methods.description: Constructor that initializes the provider with notification properties.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Simulates sending an SMS by logging the details of the message instead of actually sending it.
